site.title: Riccardo Bozzato
site.tagline: Operations & Delivery Consultant | PMP® | I bring order to growing companies: processes, projects, teams.
site.description: I bring order to growing digital companies. PMP® certified, enterprise project portfolio worth €500K+, teams of up to 12, 40% time-to-market reduction. Turning operational chaos into predictable, data-driven processes. Also building tools: VulnClaw (AI security) and Trova (SaaS boilerplate).

home.heroTagline: I bring order to growing digital companies. €500K+ portfolio, cross-functional teams, data-driven processes. My job? Making sure operations carry the weight of growth — so everything else follows.
home.featuredSubtitle: Things I built because the existing ones weren't good enough.
home.aboutText: I work as an Operations & Delivery Consultant for companies that are growing and need structure without losing speed. PMP® certified, managed enterprise projects worth €500K+ coordinating teams of 8-12 across eCommerce (Magento, Shopware) and PIM/DAM (Pimcore). In my spare time I build things: VulnClaw (AI pentesting) and Trova (SaaS boilerplate).

vulnclaw.description: An intelligent CLI agent that automates security assessments. AI-powered recon, vulnerability scanning, and exploitation — all from your terminal. Open source.

trova.title: Trova
trova.subtitle: SaaS Boilerplate That Ships
trova.description: Next.js 16, Tailwind v4, Better Auth, Drizzle ORM, i18n, Resend, Stripe, shadcn/ui. Everything you need to launch a SaaS in days, not weeks.

panificio.title: Panificio Da Sergio
panificio.subtitle: Artisan Bakery & E-Commerce
panificio.description: A full Next.js e-commerce site for a traditional Italian bakery. Product catalog, multi-language, SEO, online ordering. A gift for family.

trova.title: Trova
trova.tagline: The SaaS boilerplate that actually ships.
trova.description: Stop rebuilding auth, emails, billing, and i18n for every project. Trova gives you a production-ready foundation so you can focus on what makes your SaaS unique.

features.auth: Better Auth — magic links, OAuth (Google, GitHub), 2FA, session management
features.email: Resend + React Email — transactional emails, 5 templates included
features.i18n: next-intl — English and Italian out of the box, easy to extend
features.ui: shadcn/ui + Tailwind v4 — dark mode, responsive, customizable

about.title: About Riccardo
about.subtitle: Operations & Delivery. PMP®. Build-at-heart.
about.intro: I'm an Operations & Delivery Consultant, PMP® certified. I bring order to growing digital companies: enterprise projects, cross-functional teams, data-driven processes. €500K+ portfolio.
story: My path started in retail management — In’s Mercato, Aldi, Terranova — learning operational leadership, team management, and KPIs on the ground. Then the jump to Accenture: enterprise application development (SAP UI5, JavaScript), process automation with measurable results: +30% efficiency, -15% administrative errors.

At Esse Solutions I managed a digital project portfolio worth €500K, coordinating distributed teams of 8-12 across B2B eCommerce (Magento, Shopware) and PIM/DAM (Pimcore). I introduced structured Agile processes with concrete outcomes: +25% team productivity, -40% time-to-market, -20% project completion times.

Today I work as an independent consultant. I help digital companies build scalable operational architectures — processes, KPIs, governance — that turn complexity into automation. In my spare time I build tools: VulnClaw (AI pentesting) and Trova (SaaS boilerplate). Because the best operations builders are also product builders.
about.philosophy: The problem isn’t a lack of talent or ideas. The problem is that operations collapse under the weight of growth. My job is to build the operational architecture that turns potential into predictable execution. I combine methodological rigor (PMP®), enterprise experience, and operational speed. No bloat. No friction. Just processes that work.
about.ctaDesc: Have a project, idea, or just want to chat? I'm always open to interesting conversations.
